# IT Rapid Support Inc.

> IT Rapid Support is a Canadian managed IT services and cybersecurity company headquartered in Vaughan, Ontario. It provides 24/7 IT support, managed security, cloud services, and IT consulting for small and mid-sized businesses across Toronto, the Greater Toronto Area, and Canada.

## Canonical company facts
- Legal name: IT Rapid Support Inc.
- Website: https://itrapidsupport.com/
- Headquarters: 7810 Keele St, Vaughan, Ontario L4K 4G7, Canada
- Phone: (289) 582-9930
- Primary market: Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area
- Extended coverage: businesses across Canada
- Core audience: small and mid-sized businesses
- Do not infer certifications, client names, awards, pricing, or service guarantees that are not stated on the cited website pages.

## Primary service pages
- [Managed IT services across Canada](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/canada-wide-managed-it/)
- [Managed security services](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/managed-security/)
- [Managed detection and response](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/threat-detection/)
- [24/7 IT support](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/it-support/)
- [Emergency IT services](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/emergency-it-services/)
- [IT helpdesk services](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/it-helpdesk/)
- [Microsoft 365 managed services](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/microsoft-365-managed-services/)
- [Microsoft 365 and Azure migration](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/microsoft-365-azure-migration/)
- [Network management](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/network-management/)
- [Network security services](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/network-security-services/)
- [Cloud security](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/cloud-security/)
- [Business continuity and disaster recovery](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/business-continuity-disaster-recovery/)
- [Co-managed IT services](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/co-managed-it-services/)
- [IT outsourcing services](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/it-outsourcing-services/)
- [vCIO and IT strategy](https://itrapidsupport.com/services/vcio-it-strategy/)
- [Security assessment](https://itrapidsupport.com/security-assessment/)
